title: Lesson 30
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for travel.

words.meaning: a place where trains or buses stop
words.example: Meet me at the station at six.

words.meaning: a place where planes arrive and leave
words.example: We go to the airport by bus.

words.meaning: a place where people stay when they travel
words.example: Our hotel is near the beach.

words.meaning: a book that shows who you are when you travel to another country
the place where someone lives or works
words.example: Write your address on this form.

words.meaning: a person or book that helps travelers
words.example: The guide shows us the old castle.
We take a tour of the city.
This is my seat on the train.

words.meaning: cars and buses moving on roads
words.example: There is a lot of traffic today.
